name: canvas-home-key
note: Operator UAT 2026-07-20 ('suggested are incompatible key, new sections too suggests wrong key'; chose 'home key from first section'). Two bugs: (1) the suggestion key came from the whole-song concat (muddy on mixed-key songs) - now songHomeKey() anchors it to the FIRST (key-establishing) section, pinned on canvas entry so the chip + new-section building agree; (2) minor-key templates realized against a MAJOR-root produced OUT-OF-KEY chords (A minor's vi-IV-I-V came out F#m D A E) - now minor keys realize against their RELATIVE MAJOR so every chord lands in the key's pitch set. This song is A minor: templates must contain ZERO sharp/flat-root chords (A minor is all naturals), and building a new section must land in A Minor. Red-first on 026774a (F#m in the templates, and the derived key mismatched).

steps.label: the canvas is open on the A-minor draft
home-key + minor-realization: EVERY template chord is diatonic to A minor (all-natural roots) - no F#/accidental-root chord (the pre-fix F#m bug)
building a new section lands in the song's home key (A Minor), matching the suggestions
